effect_cn: 当你使用【杀】指定一名与你性别不同的角色为目标后，你可以令其选择一项：1. 弃置一张手牌；2. 令你摸一张牌。
effect_en: When you use [Kill] targeting a character of a different gender, you may force them to choose one: 1. Discard one hand card; 2. You draw one card.

faq.q_cn: 发动【雌雄双股剑】时，是看玩家的性别还是游戏角色的性别？
faq.a_cn: 看游戏角色的性别。
faq.q_en: When activating [Twin Swords], do we use the player's gender or the general's gender?
faq.a_en: The general's (character's) gender.

faq.q_cn: 发动【雌雄双股剑】时，由谁决定是攻击者摸牌还是被攻击者弃牌？
faq.a_cn: 由被攻击者决定。
faq.q_en: Who decides whether the attacker draws or the target discards?
faq.a_en: The target (defender) decides.

faq.q_cn: 发动【雌雄双股剑】时，被攻击者可以弃置装备区的牌或判定区的延时锦囊牌吗？
faq.a_cn: 不能。只能弃置手牌。
faq.q_en: Can the target discard equipment or time-delay tool cards when resolving [Twin Swords]?
faq.a_en: No. Only hand cards can be discarded.

faq.q_cn: 发动【雌雄双股剑】时，如果被攻击者没有手牌，如何结算？
faq.a_cn: 攻击者摸一张牌。
faq.q_en: If the target has no hand cards when [Twin Swords] activates, what happens?
faq.a_en: The attacker draws one card.

faq.q_cn: 装备【雌雄双股剑】并使用黑色【杀】攻击装备了【仁王盾】的目标时，是否可以发动武器技能？
faq.a_cn: 可以使用黑色【杀】进行攻击并发动武器技能，但由于【仁王盾】的效果，此【杀】最终无效。
faq.q_en: If the attacker uses a black [Kill] against a target equipped with [Vajra Shield], can [Twin Swords] still activate?
faq.a_en: Yes, the weapon skill can activate, but the [Kill] itself is Nullified by [Vajra Shield].

faq.q_cn: 装备【雌雄双股剑】攻击异性角色时，可以选择不发动武器技能吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以，武器技能是可选的。
faq.q_en: Can the attacker choose not to activate [Twin Swords] when attacking a character of a different gender?
faq.a_en: Yes. The weapon skill is optional.

faq.q_cn: 装备【雌雄双股剑】攻击大乔，大乔发动【流离】将目标转移后，如何结算？
faq.a_cn: 武器技能在【流离】结算后判断。若新目标满足发动条件（与攻击者性别不同），则由新目标承担武器效果。
faq.q_en: If the attacker targets Da Qiao with [Twin Swords] equipped and Da Qiao uses [Fleeting] to redirect the [Kill], how is the weapon resolved?
faq.a_en: The weapon skill is evaluated after [Fleeting] resolves. If the new target meets the condition (different gender), they bear the weapon's effect instead.

faq.q_cn: 马超或黄忠装备【雌雄双股剑】并使用【杀】指定异性目标后，武将技能和武器技能如何结算？
faq.a_cn: 先发动武将技能，再发动武器技能。例如：马超对黄月英使用【杀】并发动【铁骑】，判定结果出来后，黄月英再选择弃手牌或令马超摸牌，然后结算伤害。
faq.q_en: If Ma Chao or Huang Zhong (equipped with [Twin Swords]) uses [Kill] on an opposite-gender target, in what order do the general skill and weapon skill resolve?
faq.a_en: The general's skill resolves first, then the weapon skill. For example: Ma Chao uses [Kill] on Huang Yueying and activates [Iron Cavalry]; after the judgment, Huang Yueying chooses to discard or let Ma Chao draw, then damage is dealt.

faq.q_cn: 女性角色装备【雌雄双股剑】对只有一张手牌的诸葛亮使用【杀】，若诸葛亮弃置该牌后进入空城状态，伤害如何结算？
faq.a_cn: 诸葛亮弃牌后仍须承受此【杀】的伤害，受伤后再进入空城状态。一旦已成为【杀】的目标，空城状态无法阻止伤害结算。
faq.q_en: A female general equipped with [Twin Swords] uses [Kill] on Zhuge Liang who has only one hand card. If Zhuge Liang discards that card (entering Empty City), is the damage still dealt?
faq.a_en: Yes. Once Zhuge Liang is already the target of a [Kill], Empty City cannot prevent the damage. He discards the card, takes the damage, and then enters Empty City.

effect_cn: 锁定技，若你使用的【杀】是你最后的手牌，则此【杀】可以多选择两个目标（至多三个目标）。若任意目标使用【闪】抵消了此【杀】，则此【杀】对其余目标均无效。
effect_en: Locked: If the [Kill] you use is your last hand card, it may target up to two additional characters (up to three targets total). If any target uses a [Dodge] to negate the [Kill], the [Kill] is also negated for all remaining targets.

faq.q_cn: 发动【方天画戟】技能时，可以只选择一名或两名目标角色吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以。最多三名，但并非强制选满。
faq.q_en: When activating [Sky Piercer], can the attacker choose fewer than three targets?
faq.a_en: Yes. Up to three targets may be chosen, but choosing the maximum is not required.

faq.q_cn: 发动【方天画戟】技能时，若攻击者在结算过程中死亡，是否继续结算剩余目标？
faq.a_cn: 是的，除非游戏结束条件已满足。
faq.q_en: If the attacker dies during [Sky Piercer]'s resolution, do the remaining targets still resolve?
faq.a_en: Yes, unless the game-ending condition has been met.

faq.q_cn: 发动【方天画戟】技能时，若诸葛亮是目标之一，轮到其结算时进入空城状态，如何处理？
faq.a_cn: 空城状态无法阻止已成为目标的结算。诸葛亮正常受到此【杀】的伤害。
faq.q_en: If Zhuge Liang is one of the [Sky Piercer]'s targets and enters Empty City by the time his resolution is reached, what happens?
faq.a_en: Empty City cannot prevent resolution once he is already a target. Zhuge Liang takes the damage normally.

faq.q_cn: 无手牌的刘备装备【方天画戟】，通过【激将】借用他人的【杀】，能发动武器技能吗？
faq.a_cn: 不能。【方天画戟】要求必须是使用者自己的最后一张手牌，通过【激将】使用的【杀】不满足此条件。
faq.q_en: Liu Bei has no hand cards and is equipped with [Sky Piercer]. He activates [Rally] to have an ally play a [Kill]. Can the weapon skill activate?
faq.a_en: No. [Sky Piercer] requires the [Kill] to be the attacker's own last hand card. A [Kill] played via [Rally] does not satisfy this condition.

faq.q_cn: 夏侯渊发动【神速】打出的最后一张装备牌（而非【杀】），能否触发【方天画戟】特效？
faq.a_cn: 不可以。武器技能只由【杀】触发，且必须是手牌中的最后一张。
faq.q_en: Xiahou Yuan activates [Godspeed] and the last card played is an equipment card, not a [Kill]. Can [Sky Piercer]'s skill activate?
faq.a_en: No. The weapon skill only triggers when the last hand card played is a [Kill].

faq.q_cn: 发动【方天画戟】技能时，大乔发动【流离】将自己身上的【杀】转移给另一个目标，如何结算？
faq.a_cn: 被【流离】的角色须承受两次【杀】的结算。大乔必须在被指定为目标时立即发动【流离】，而非轮到她结算时才发动。
faq.q_en: During [Sky Piercer]'s resolution, Da Qiao uses [Fleeting] to redirect the [Kill] aimed at her onto another existing target. How is this resolved?
faq.a_en: The redirected character must resolve two separate [Kill] instances. Da Qiao must activate [Fleeting] immediately when she is designated as a target, not when the [Kill] resolves on her in turn order.

effect_cn: 每回合出牌阶段开始时，你可以摸一张牌。当你使用【杀】对目标角色造成伤害时，你可以选择一张该角色的装备牌，将其转移至你的装备区。
effect_en: At the start of your Action Phase each turn, you may draw one card. When your [Kill] deals damage to a target, you may choose one of their equipment cards and move it into your own Equipment Zone.

faq.q_cn: 【飞龙夺凤】转移装备时，若目标装备区对应位置已有装备，如何处理？
faq.a_cn: 被转移的装备替换你装备区内原有的同类装备，原有装备被弃置。
faq.q_en: If your Equipment Zone already has a card in the same slot as the one you are taking with [Soaring Dragon Blade], what happens?
faq.a_en: The taken equipment replaces your existing card in that slot; your old equipment is discarded.

faq.q_cn: 使用此牌时，是否须先将【黑桃2 雌雄双股剑】从牌堆中移除？
faq.a_cn: 是的。按照游戏规则，【飞龙夺凤】在加入游戏时须替换标准版中的【黑桃2 雌雄双股剑】。
faq.q_en: Does [Soaring Dragon Blade] replace another card in the deck?
faq.a_en: Yes. When including this card, it replaces the ♠2 [Twin Swords] from the standard deck.

effect_cn: 锁定技，当你使用【杀】对目标角色造成伤害时，若该角色没有手牌，则此伤害+1。
effect_en: Locked: When your [Kill] deals damage to a target, if that target has no hand cards, the damage dealt is increased by 1.

faq.q_cn: 装备【古锭刀】使用火【杀】或雷【杀】触发连环伤害时，连环伤害传导到没有手牌的角色，伤害是否+1？
faq.a_cn: 不会。【古锭刀】只对使用【杀】的直接目标生效，不影响连环传导的伤害。
faq.q_en: If a fire or thunder [Kill] triggers a chain reaction, does [Ancient Scimitar]'s bonus damage apply to chained characters who have no hand cards?
faq.a_en: No. [Ancient Scimitar] only applies to the direct target of the [Kill]; it does not affect chain-spread damage.

faq.q_cn: 装备【古锭刀】攻击没有手牌的大乔，大乔发动【流离】后，新目标若也没有手牌，伤害是否+1？
faq.a_cn: 对大乔本人的伤害不+1（她不再是目标）。若【流离】的新目标没有手牌，则对新目标的伤害+1。
faq.q_en: The attacker equipped with [Ancient Scimitar] targets Da Qiao (no hand cards); Da Qiao uses [Fleeting] to redirect the [Kill]. If the new target also has no hand cards, does the bonus damage apply?
faq.a_en: The bonus does not apply to Da Qiao since she is no longer the target. If the new target has no hand cards, the +1 bonus applies to them.

faq.q_cn: 装备【古锭刀】攻击小乔，小乔发动【天香】将伤害转移给一名无手牌的角色，该角色是否受到+1伤害？
faq.a_cn: 不会。【古锭刀】只针对【杀】的直接目标（小乔），【天香】转移的伤害不触发武器效果。
faq.q_en: The attacker uses [Kill] on Xiao Qiao (equipped with [Ancient Scimitar]); Xiao Qiao activates [Heavenly Fragrance] to redirect the damage to another character with no hand cards. Does the bonus apply?
faq.a_en: No. [Ancient Scimitar] only affects the direct target of the [Kill] (Xiao Qiao). Damage redirected by [Heavenly Fragrance] does not trigger the weapon bonus.

faq.q_cn: 装备【古锭刀】攻击无手牌但装备【八卦阵】的郭嘉，郭嘉判定为黑色后发动【天妒】将判定牌收入手牌，此时是否受到+1伤害？
faq.a_cn: 不受+1伤害。郭嘉通过【天妒】获得了手牌，因此在伤害结算时有手牌，不满足触发条件。
faq.q_en: Guo Jia has no hand cards but is equipped with [Eight Trigrams Formation]. He fails the judgment and activates [Genius] to take the judgment card into his hand. Does [Ancient Scimitar]'s bonus now apply?
faq.a_en: No. Guo Jia now has a hand card (from [Genius]), so the condition for the bonus is no longer met at the time damage is resolved.

effect_cn: 当你使用的【杀】被目标角色使用的【闪】抵消后，你可以弃置两张牌。若如此做，此【杀】依然造成伤害。
effect_en: When your [Kill] is negated by a target's [Dodge], you may discard two cards. If you do, the [Kill] still deals damage.

faq.q_cn: 发动【贯石斧】技能时，可以弃置自己装备区里的牌吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以，但不能弃置【贯石斧】本身。
faq.q_en: Can the attacker discard equipment cards from their own Equipment Zone to activate [Stonepiercer]?
faq.a_en: Yes, but [Stonepiercer] itself cannot be discarded.

faq.q_cn: 装备【贯石斧】命中曹操后，曹操发动【奸雄】可以收取什么牌？
faq.a_cn: 曹操收取对其造成伤害的那张【杀】。
faq.q_en: If [Stonepiercer] forces damage through and hits Cao Cao, what card does [Mastermind] collect?
faq.a_en: Cao Cao collects the [Kill] card that dealt damage to him.

faq.q_cn: 陆逊装备【贯石斧】发动武器技能，是否可以先弃一张手牌触发【连营】，再弃第二张来凑够两张？
faq.a_cn: 不能。弃置两张牌必须同时进行。
faq.q_en: Lu Xun is equipped with [Stonepiercer] and wants to activate the weapon skill. Can he discard one card first to trigger [Chain Barracks], then discard a second card?
faq.a_en: No. The two cards must be discarded simultaneously.

faq.q_cn: 装备【贯石斧】攻击距离为3的目标，是否可以弃置自己装备的-1马来发动技能（弃后目标不在攻击范围内）？
faq.a_cn: 可以。弃牌在伤害结算之前进行，即便弃牌后目标超出攻击范围，伤害仍然有效。
faq.q_en: The attacker is equipped with [Stonepiercer] and targets a character at distance 3. Can they discard their equipped -1 Mount (making the target out of range) to power the weapon skill?
faq.a_en: Yes. The discard happens before damage is resolved. Even if the target is now out of range, the damage still applies.

faq.q_cn: 装备【贯石斧】攻击只有一张【闪】手牌的诸葛亮，诸葛亮打出【闪】后进入空城状态，是否可以发动武器技能并造成伤害？
faq.a_cn: 可以。诸葛亮已成为【杀】的目标，发动武器技能后他须承受伤害，无论此时是否处于空城状态。
faq.q_en: The attacker uses [Kill] on Zhuge Liang (only hand card is a [Dodge]); Zhuge Liang plays [Dodge] and enters Empty City. Can [Stonepiercer] force the damage through?
faq.a_en: Yes. Zhuge Liang is already the target of the [Kill]. Once the weapon skill activates, he takes the damage regardless of his Empty City state.

faq.q_cn: 装备【贯石斧】攻击张角，若张角使用【闪】触发【雷击】，如何结算？
faq.a_cn: 先结算【雷击】判定。判定完成后，若攻击者仍存活，可选择是否弃两张牌强制命中。
faq.q_en: The attacker equipped with [Stonepiercer] uses [Kill] on Zhang Jiao; Zhang Jiao plays [Dodge] and activates [Lightning Strike]. How does this resolve?
faq.a_en: Resolve [Lightning Strike]'s judgment first. After it resolves, if the attacker is still alive, they may choose to discard two cards to force the damage through.

faq.q_cn: 太史慈通过拼点赢得额外【杀】并使用多目标【杀】时，能对每个出【闪】的目标分别发动武器技能吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以。每当一名目标出【闪】，太史慈可立即选择是否发动【贯石斧】技能强制命中该目标。
faq.q_en: Tai Shi Ci wins a duel and uses a multi-target [Kill]. Can he activate [Stonepiercer] separately for each target that plays a [Dodge]?
faq.a_en: Yes. Each time a target plays a [Dodge], Tai Shi Ci may immediately choose whether to activate [Stonepiercer] against that target.

effect_cn: 当你使用【杀】对目标角色造成伤害时，若该角色有牌，你可以防止此伤害，然后依次弃置其两张牌（可从其手牌或装备区中选择）。
effect_en: When your [Kill] would deal damage to a target, if that target has any cards (hand or equipment), you may prevent the damage and instead discard two of their cards one at a time (choosing from their hand or Equipment Zone).

faq.q_cn: 发动【寒冰剑】时，是否可以选择对方装备区的牌？
faq.a_cn: 可以，手牌和装备区的牌均可选择。
faq.q_en: When activating [Frost Blade], can the attacker choose equipment cards from the target's Equipment Zone?
faq.a_en: Yes. Cards from both the hand and the Equipment Zone may be chosen.

faq.q_cn: 发动【寒冰剑】后，目标在弃第一张牌后没有牌了，是否还要弃第二张？
faq.a_cn: 不需要。若弃第一张牌后目标区域内已无牌，则跳过第二次弃牌。
faq.q_en: After [Frost Blade] discards the first card, if the target has no more cards, must a second card still be discarded?
faq.a_en: No. If no cards remain after the first discard, the second discard is skipped.

faq.q_cn: 发动【寒冰剑】是否强制？
faq.a_cn: 不强制。此技能为可选效果，攻击者可以选择正常造成伤害而不发动。
faq.q_en: Is activating [Frost Blade]'s effect mandatory?
faq.a_en: No. It is optional; the attacker may choose to deal normal damage instead.

effect_cn: 当你使用【杀】对目标角色造成伤害时，你可以弃置其装备区里的一张坐骑牌。
effect_en: When your [Kill] deals damage to a target, you may discard one of their equipped mount cards.

faq.q_cn: 使用【麒麟弓】可以同时弃置目标的+1马和-1马吗？
faq.a_cn: 不行，每次只能弃置一张坐骑牌。
faq.q_en: Can [Kirin Bow] discard both a +1 Mount and a -1 Mount in one activation?
faq.a_en: No. Only one mount card may be discarded per activation.

faq.q_cn: 若目标没有坐骑牌，是否可以发动【麒麟弓】？
faq.a_cn: 不可以，目标必须装备有坐骑牌才能发动此技能。
faq.q_en: Can [Kirin Bow] activate if the target has no mount cards equipped?
faq.a_en: No. The target must have at least one mount equipped for the skill to activate.

effect_cn: 锁定技，当你使用【杀】指定一个目标后，令该目标的防具本次无效。
effect_en: Locked: When you use [Kill] targeting a character, that character's equipped armor is Nullified for that [Kill].

faq.q_cn: 【青釭剑】能使【仁王盾】无效吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以。【仁王盾】视为防具，【青釭剑】可令其在本次【杀】中无效。
faq.q_en: Can [Qing Gang Sword] negate [Vajra Shield]?
faq.a_en: Yes. [Vajra Shield] is treated as armor, so [Qing Gang Sword] Nullifies it for that [Kill].

faq.q_cn: 【青釭剑】是否影响【八卦阵】的判定？
faq.a_cn: 是的。【八卦阵】也是防具，被【青釭剑】无效后，目标无法用【八卦阵】进行判定来当【闪】使用。
faq.q_en: Does [Qing Gang Sword] affect [Eight Trigrams Formation]?
faq.a_en: Yes. [Eight Trigrams Formation] is armor. While Nullified by [Qing Gang Sword], the target cannot use its Judgment to produce a [Dodge].

effect_cn: 当你使用的【杀】被目标角色使用的【闪】抵消后，你可以对该角色再使用一张【杀】。
锁定技，当你使用【杀】时，所有目标角色不能明置武将牌，直到此【杀】结算完毕为止。
effect_en: When your [Kill] is negated by a target's [Dodge], you may immediately use another [Kill] against that same target.
Locked: When you use [Kill], all target characters cannot reveal (flip face-up) their general cards until the [Kill] finishes resolving.

faq.q_cn: 发动【青龙偃月刀】追加的【杀】是否也可以触发武器技能？
faq.a_cn: 可以，若追加的【杀】也被【闪】抵消，可再次发动武器技能。
faq.q_en: If the follow-up [Kill] from [Green Dragon Crescent Blade] is also negated by a [Dodge], can the weapon skill activate again?
faq.a_en: Yes. If the follow-up [Kill] is also negated, the weapon skill can trigger again.

faq.q_cn: 锁定技（禁止明置）是否影响无武将牌明置需求的技能？
faq.a_cn: 只影响需要明置武将牌的技能，不涉及明置的技能均不受影响。
faq.q_en: Does the Locked effect (preventing general card reveal) affect skills that do not require revealing a general card?
faq.a_en: No. It only prevents skills that specifically require flipping or revealing the general card. Skills with no such requirement are unaffected.

effect_cn: 当你使用【杀】对目标角色造成伤害后，你可以弃置一张手牌，然后对该目标距离为1的一名其他角色造成1点伤害。
effect_en: After your [Kill] deals damage to a target, you may discard one hand card to deal 1 damage to another character who is at distance 1 from that target.

faq.q_cn: 【三尖两刃刀】的附加伤害是否属于【杀】的伤害？
faq.a_cn: 不是。附加伤害是武器技能造成的独立伤害，与【杀】无关。
faq.q_en: Is the bonus damage from [Three-Point Glaive] considered damage from a [Kill]?
faq.a_en: No. The bonus damage is independent weapon skill damage and is not treated as [Kill] damage.

faq.q_cn: 计算距离为1时，是否计入坐骑和技能的距离修正？
faq.a_cn: 是的，距离计算包含所有修正（坐骑、技能等）。
faq.q_en: When determining which characters are at distance 1 from the target, do mount cards and skill-based distance modifiers apply?
faq.a_en: Yes. All distance modifiers (mounts, skills, etc.) are applied when calculating distance.

effect_cn: 锁定技，与你势力相同的其他角色攻击范围+1。
effect_en: Locked: All other characters of the same faction as you gain +1 attack range.

faq.q_cn: 【吴六剑】是否对自己生效？
faq.a_cn: 不对，只对与你势力相同的其他角色生效。
faq.q_en: Does [Six Swords of Wu] increase the attacker's own attack range?
faq.a_en: No. The effect only applies to other characters of the same faction.

faq.q_cn: 若一名角色势力未确定，是否受【吴六剑】影响？
faq.a_cn: 不受影响。势力未确定的角色不属于任何势力，无法从【吴六剑】获益。
faq.q_en: Does [Six Swords of Wu] affect characters whose faction has not yet been determined?
faq.a_en: No. Characters with an undetermined faction do not belong to any faction and cannot benefit from [Six Swords of Wu].

effect_cn: 你可以将两张手牌当【杀】使用或打出。
effect_en: You may treat any two hand cards as a [Kill] to use or play.

faq.q_cn: 发动【丈八蛇矛】技能时，可以使用装备区的牌替代手牌吗？
faq.a_cn: 不可以，必须使用手牌。
faq.q_en: Can equipment cards from your Equipment Zone be used in place of hand cards for [Serpent Spear]?
faq.a_en: No. Only hand cards may be used.

faq.q_cn: 使用【丈八蛇矛】时，必须同时打出两张手牌吗？
faq.a_cn: 是的，必须同时打出两张手牌。
faq.q_en: Must both hand cards be played simultaneously when activating [Serpent Spear]?
faq.a_en: Yes. Both cards must be played at the same time.

faq.q_cn: 用【丈八蛇矛】打出的【杀】，其属性（普通/火/雷）如何判定？
faq.a_cn: 无论两张牌的花色如何，通过【丈八蛇矛】打出的【杀】均视为普通【杀】（无属性）。
faq.q_en: What type of [Kill] (normal / fire / thunder) is produced by [Serpent Spear]?
faq.a_en: Regardless of the suits of the two cards used, the resulting [Kill] is always treated as a normal [Kill] with no elemental property.

faq.q_cn: 用【丈八蛇矛】打出的【杀】，其点数、花色和颜色如何判定？
faq.a_cn: 通过【丈八蛇矛】使用的【杀】是将两张实体牌当【杀】操作，依据「将…牌当A牌操作」规则：牌名变为【杀】，但花色、点数、颜色仍为原来两张牌各自的信息。由于是两张牌，具体使用哪张牌的属性（如拼点）以实际结算为准。
faq.q_en: What are the rank, suit, and color of a [Kill] produced by [Serpent Spear]?
faq.a_en: A [Kill] from [Serpent Spear] uses two physical cards treated as [Kill] under the 'treat card as' rule: the card name becomes [Kill], but each card's original suit, rank, and color are retained. Since two cards are involved, the specific attributes used in any subsequent check (e.g. a Point Duel) follow the normal resolution for whichever card applies.

faq.q_cn: 是否可以发动【丈八蛇矛】响应【南蛮入侵】或【决斗】？
faq.a_cn: 可以。
faq.q_en: Can [Serpent Spear] be used to respond to [Barbarians] or [Duel]?
faq.a_en: Yes.

faq.q_cn: 蜀国武将装备【丈八蛇矛】时，可以用武器技能响应刘备的【激将】吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以。
faq.q_en: If a Shu general is equipped with [Serpent Spear], can they use its skill to respond to Liu Bei's [Rally]?
faq.a_en: Yes.

effect_cn: 锁定技，你使用【杀】无次数限制。
effect_en: Locked: You may use [Kill] any number of times per turn (the normal once-per-turn limit is removed).

faq.q_cn: 装备【诸葛连弩】后，若将其换掉，本回合还能继续无限使用【杀】吗？
faq.a_cn: 不能。失去【诸葛连弩】后，【杀】的使用次数恢复正常限制。若本回合已超出正常次数，则不能再使用【杀】。
faq.q_en: If [Repeating Crossbow] is replaced during the turn, can [Kill] still be used freely for the rest of that turn?
faq.a_en: No. Once [Repeating Crossbow] is gone, the normal [Kill] limit is restored. If the normal limit has already been exceeded, no further [Kill] cards may be played that turn.

faq.q_cn: 【诸葛连弩】是否解除每回合只能使用一张【杀】的限制？
faq.a_cn: 是的，装备【诸葛连弩】期间，使用【杀】不受次数限制。
faq.q_en: Does [Repeating Crossbow] completely remove the once-per-turn [Kill] limit?
faq.a_en: Yes. While equipped, there is no limit to how many [Kill] cards can be used per turn.

effect_cn: 当你使用普通【杀】时，你可以将此【杀】改为火【杀】。
effect_en: When you use a normal [Kill], you may convert it into a fire [Kill].

faq.q_cn: 【朱雀羽扇】可以将雷【杀】或火【杀】改为火【杀】吗？
faq.a_cn: 不可以，只能将普通【杀】改为火【杀】。
faq.q_en: Can [Vermilion Bird Fan] convert a thunder [Kill] or another fire [Kill] into a fire [Kill]?
faq.a_en: No. It can only convert a normal (non-elemental) [Kill] into a fire [Kill].

faq.q_cn: 是否可以选择不发动【朱雀羽扇】的效果？
faq.a_cn: 可以，此技能为可选效果。
faq.q_en: Is the conversion effect of [Vermilion Bird Fan] optional?
faq.a_en: Yes. The conversion is optional.

effect_cn: 每回合限两次，你使用【杀】或普通锦囊牌可以增加一个目标；此牌离开你的装备区后，你回复1点体力；此牌置入弃牌堆时移出游戏。
effect_en: Twice per turn, when you use [Kill] or a Non Time-Delay Tool card, you may add one additional target. When this card leaves your Equipment Zone, you recover 1 HP. When this card enters the Discard Pile, it is instead Removed from the Game.

effect_cn: 当你使用【杀】指定目标后，你可以令其进行判定，若结果为黑桃，其受到3点雷电伤害；梅花，其受到1点雷电伤害，你回复1点体力并摸一张牌；此牌置入弃牌堆时移出游戏。
effect_en: After you use [Kill] and designate a target, you may have that character perform a Judgment: if the result is Spades, they take 3 lightning damage; if Clubs, they take 1 lightning damage and you recover 1 HP and draw 1 card. When this card enters the Discard Pile, it is instead Removed from the Game.

effect_cn: 锁定技，当你使用【杀】指定目标后，你令其横置。
effect_en: Locked: After you use [Kill] and designate a target, place that character's General Card in horizontal position.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，当你一次失去至少两张手牌后，你可以弃置一名其他角色等量的牌。
effect_en: During your Action Phase, after you lose at least 2 hand cards at once, you may discard an equal number of cards from one other character.

effect_cn: 当你使用【杀】指定目标后，你可以令其失去X点体力(X为你本回合发动该技能的次数且至多为5)；此牌置入弃牌堆时移出游戏。
effect_en: After you use [Kill] and designate a target, you may have that character lose X HP (X = the number of times you have activated this effect this turn, up to 5). When this card enters the Discard Pile, it is instead Removed from the Game.

effect_cn: 每回合限一次，当你使用【杀】造成伤害后，你可以进行判定，若结果为黑色，你摸两张牌，红色，你回复1点体力；此牌置入弃牌堆时移出游戏。
effect_en: Once per turn, after your [Kill] deals damage, you may perform a Judgment: if the result is Black, draw 2 cards; if Red, recover 1 HP. When this card enters the Discard Pile, it is instead Removed from the Game.

effect_cn: 当你使用的【杀】被抵消时，你可以失去1点体力。然后获得此【杀】并摸一张牌，本回合你使用【杀】的次数+1。
effect_en: When a [Kill] you use is negated, you may lose 1 HP. If you do, gain that [Kill] and draw 1 card, and your [Kill] frequency limit increases by 1 this turn.

effect_cn: 当你使用雷【杀】和【火杀】指定目标后，你可以令其选择一项：1.你摸一张牌；2.弃置一张牌。
effect_en: After you use a thunder [Kill] or fire [Kill] and designate a target, you may have that character choose one: 1. You draw 1 card; 2. They discard 1 card.

effect_cn: 锁定技，你使用【杀】无视目标角色防具，其不能使用或打出手牌直到结算完成。
effect_en: Locked: When you use [Kill], Ignore the target character's armor. That character cannot use or play out hand cards until the resolution is complete.

effect_cn: 每回合限两次，当你使用【杀】对目标角色造成伤害时，你可以弃置一张牌令此伤害+1；出牌阶段，你使用【杀】的次数+1；此牌置入弃牌堆时移出游戏。
effect_en: Twice per turn, when your [Kill] deals damage to a target character, you may discard 1 card to increase that damage by 1. During your Action Phase, your [Kill] frequency limit increases by 1. When this card enters the Discard Pile, it is instead Removed from the Game.

effect_cn: 锁定技，你使用的红色【杀】不能被响应。
effect_en: Locked: Red [Kill] cards you use cannot be responded to.

effect_cn: 当你使用【杀】对目标角色造成伤害后，你可以摸一张牌或弃置其一张牌。
effect_en: After your [Kill] deals damage to a target character, you may draw 1 card or discard 1 of their cards.

effect_cn: 锁定技，你使用【杀】无视目标角色防具；当你使用【杀】对目标角色造成伤害时，若其未受伤，此伤害+1。
effect_en: Locked: When you use [Kill], Ignore the target character's armor. When your [Kill] deals damage to a target character, if that character is Unwounded, that damage is increased by 1.

effect_cn: 当你使用【杀】指定一名角色为目标后,你可令该角色弃置你的一张手牌,然后你弃置其一张手牌。
effect_en: After you use [Kill] and designate a target, you may have that character discard 1 of your hand cards, then you discard 1 of their hand cards.

faq.q_cn: 发动【冲钢槊】技能时，若攻击者没有手牌，是否可以发动？
faq.a_cn: 可以。攻击者令目标弃置其一张手牌；若攻击者无手牌，第一步（目标弃置攻击者手牌）跳过，直接由攻击者弃置目标的一张手牌。
faq.q_en: Can [Tempered Steel Lance] activate if the attacker has no hand cards?
faq.a_en: Yes. If the attacker has no hand cards, the first step (target discards attacker's card) is skipped, and the attacker directly discards one of the target's hand cards.

faq.q_cn: 目标弃置攻击者手牌后，攻击者是否必须弃置目标手牌？
faq.a_cn: 是的，技能发动后两步均须执行（在条件允许的情况下）。
faq.q_en: After the target discards one of the attacker's hand cards, must the attacker then discard one of the target's hand cards?
faq.a_en: Yes. Once activated, both steps must be carried out where possible.

effect_cn: 你使用的属性【杀】可以视为任意属性。
effect_en: Elemental [Kill] cards you use may be treated as any elemental type.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段，当你使用牌指定唯一目标后，你可以弃置两张牌，令其本回合防具无效且不能使用或打出牌。
effect_en: During your Action Phase, after you use a card and designate exactly one target, you may discard 2 cards — that character's armor is Nullified for this turn and they cannot use or play cards.

effect_cn: 结束阶段，你可以视为使用一张【杀】，此【杀】无距离限制且仅能被场上角色使用的【无懈可击】抵消。
effect_en: During your End Phase, you may be treated as using a [Kill]. This [Kill] has no distance restriction and can only be Negated by [Nullification] used by characters on the field.

faq.q_cn: 【藏锋】是什么类型的牌？它如何占用装备栏？
faq.a_cn: 【藏锋】是游戏中第一张“双副类别装备牌”，同时视为武器牌和宝物牌。处于装备区时，同时占用武器栏和宝物栏。
faq.q_en: What type of card is [Ink Brush], and how does it occupy Equipment Zone slots?
faq.a_en: [Ink Brush] is the first 'dual sub-category equipment card' in the game. It is simultaneously treated as both a Weapon Card and a Treasure Card, and occupies both the Weapon slot and the Treasure slot of the Equipment Zone at the same time.

faq.q_cn: 将【藏锋】置入装备区时，会替换什么？
faq.a_cn: 将【藏锋】置入一名角色的装备区时，同时替换该角色装备区中的武器牌和宝物牌（若有）。
faq.q_en: When [Ink Brush] is placed into a character's Equipment Zone, what does it replace?
faq.a_en: When [Ink Brush] is placed into a character's Equipment Zone, it simultaneously replaces both their equipped Weapon Card and their equipped Treasure Card, if any.

faq.q_cn: 已装备【藏锋】的角色使用武器牌或宝物牌时，会发生什么？
faq.a_cn: 当已装备【藏锋】的角色使用武器牌或宝物牌时，该武器牌或宝物牌会替换【藏锋】。
faq.q_en: What happens when a character equipped with [Ink Brush] uses a Weapon Card or Treasure Card?
faq.a_en: When a character equipped with [Ink Brush] uses a Weapon Card or Treasure Card, that card replaces [Ink Brush] in their Equipment Zone.

effect_cn: 你的牌均可视为红桃花色。
effect_en: All your cards may be treated as having the Hearts suit.

effect_cn: 你可以将你的任一普通 【杀】当着雷电伤害的 【杀】来使用。
effect_en: You may use any normal [Kill] as a lightning [Kill].

effect_cn: 你使用【杀】对一名角色造成伤害时,你可以获得对方装备区里的一张牌。
effect_en: When your [Kill] deals damage to a character, you may gain one card from their Equipment Zone.

effect_cn: 你的回合外，每当你使用或打出了一张黑色手牌 (若为使用则在它结算之前)，你可以立即对你攻击范围内的任意一名角色使用一张【杀】。
effect_en: Outside of your turn, whenever you use or play out a black hand card (if using, before it resolves), you may immediately use a [Kill] against any one character within your Attack Range.

faq.q_cn: 【银月槍】在自己的回合内可以发动吗？
faq.a_cn: 不能，只能在自己回合外发动。
faq.q_en: Can [Moon Spear] be activated during your own turn?
faq.a_en: No. It can only activate outside of your own turn.

effect_cn: 当你使用非延时类锦囊对其他玩家造成伤害时，你可立即摸1张手牌。
effect_en: When you deal damage to another character by using a Non Time-Delay Tool card, you may immediately draw 1 card.

effect_cn: 锁定技，你的一张【杀】最多可以制定2个目标
effect_en: Locked: Your [Kill] may designate up to 2 targets.

effect_cn: 任何时候,你每打出一张【杀】，则立即摸1张手牌。
effect_en: At any time, whenever you play out a [Kill], immediately draw 1 card.

effect_cn: 你可将黑桃花色的【杀】当做【单挑】使用。
effect_en: You may use a Spades [Kill] as a [Duel].

effect_cn: 在任意角色的判定牌生效前,你可以打出一张手牌代替之。
effect_en: Before any character's Judgment Card takes effect, you may play out a hand card to substitute for it.

effect_cn: 当你打出的【杀】被闪避后，可再丢弃一张【杀】使目标受到1点伤害。
effect_en: When a [Kill] you play out is negated by a [Dodge], you may discard a [Kill] to deal 1 damage to that target.

effect_cn: 你所指定【决斗】的角色均不能出【杀】抵御。
effect_en: Characters you target with [Duel] cannot play out [Kill] to respond.

effect_cn: 你可将【闪】当做雷属性的【杀】使用。
effect_en: You may use a [Dodge] as a thunder [Kill].

effect_cn: 你所打出红色的【杀】均需要2张【闪】才能闪避。
effect_en: Red [Kill] cards you use require the target to play out 2 [Dodge] cards to negate them.

effect_cn: 你打出【杀】时,可弃置两张手牌使【杀】 伤害+1。
effect_en: When you play out a [Kill], you may discard 2 hand cards to increase that [Kill]'s damage by 1.

effect_cn: 回合内，当你使用第六张牌时，进行一次判定：红色，你令一名已阵亡角色回复到初始状态；黑色，你令一名角色立刻阵亡。
你的手牌上限翻1倍。
effect_en: During your turn, when you use your sixth card, perform a Judgment: if Red, restore one eliminated character to their starting state; if Black, one character is immediately eliminated.
Your Hand Limit is doubled.

effect_cn: 锁定技，你的打出的红色牌，目标角色不能出牌响应。失去此武器后，你额外增加一倍的体力上限值。
effect_en: Locked: Red cards you play out cannot be responded to. When you lose this weapon, your Max HP is doubled.

effect_cn: 锁定技，你的打出的红色牌，目标角色不能出牌响应。失去此武器后，你额外增加一倍的体力上限值。
effect_en: Locked: Red cards you play out cannot be responded to. When you lose this weapon, your Max HP is doubled.

effect_cn: 结束阶段开始时，你可以弃置装备区里的【烈刃飞刀】然后展示你攻击范围内所有其他角色的一张手牌，选择其中一张，你获得之，然后将其余的牌置入弃牌堆。
effect_en: At the start of your End Phase, you may discard [Scythe] from your Equipment Zone — then each other character within your Attack Range reveals 1 hand card. Choose one of those cards to gain; place the remaining revealed cards into the Discard Pile.

effect_cn: 你使用【杀】指定异性为目标时，你可以选择一项：此【杀】不可被抵消；此【杀】造成的伤害+1。
effect_en: When you use [Kill] targeting a character of the opposite gender, choose one: 1. This [Kill] cannot be negated; 2. The damage dealt by this [Kill] is increased by 1.

effect_cn: 锁定技，每当你使用【杀】未造成伤害，你对距离1另一名角色造成1点伤害。
effect_en: Locked: Whenever a [Kill] you use deals no damage, deal 1 damage to another character at distance 1.

effect_cn: 锁定技，每当你使用【杀】造成伤害时，若目标角色未受伤，你令伤害+1。
effect_en: Locked: Whenever your [Kill] deals damage to a target character, if that character is Unwounded, that damage is increased by 1.

effect_cn: 锁定技，使用【杀】造成伤害后，目标扣减1点体力上限。
effect_en: Locked: After your [Kill] deals damage, the target character's Max HP is reduced by 1.

effect_cn: 回合内，当你使用第六张牌时，进行一次判定：红色，你令一名已阵亡角色回复到初始状态；黑色，你令一名角色立刻阵亡。
你的手牌上限翻1倍。
effect_en: During your turn, when you use your sixth card, perform a Judgment: if Red, restore one eliminated character to their starting state; if Black, one character is immediately eliminated.
Your Hand Limit is doubled.

effect_cn: 锁定技，回合内，当你打出第一张点数为奇数的【杀】时，可以摸7张牌。失去此装备后，你回复体力至上限值。
effect_en: Locked: During your turn, when you first play out a [Kill] with an odd rank, you may draw 7 cards. When you lose this weapon, you recover HP up to your Max HP.

effect_cn: 锁定技，你的结束阶段，对场上装备区内有牌的角色，依次造成2点火属性的伤害。并且你免疫火属性的伤害。
effect_en: Locked: During your End Phase, deal 2 fire damage in sequence to each character on the field who has cards in their Equipment Zone. You are immune to fire damage.

effect_cn: 你的打出的【杀】可定义为禁技杀，并且额外指定多一名目标角色。 失去此牌后，你对一名角色造成3点体力伤害。
effect_en: [Kill] cards you play out may be designated as Skill-Suppressing [Kill]s, and may designate one additional target. When you lose this weapon, deal 3 damage to one character.

effect_cn: 有判定牌生效前，你可以拿一张牌替换之。 当失去此牌后，你可弃置一名角色区域内的所有牌，并将其体力值改为一点。
effect_en: Before any Judgment Card takes effect, you may replace it with a card from your hand (you keep the original Judgment Card). When you lose this weapon, you may discard all cards in one character's zone and set their HP Value to 1.

effect_cn: 锁定技，你的【杀】无视目标角色的防具。若你手牌大于或血量小于目标角色，此【杀】不能被响应，且伤害+1。
effect_en: Locked: Your [Kill] Ignores the target character's armor. If your hand card count is greater than, or your HP Value is less than, the target's, that [Kill] cannot be responded to and its damage is increased by 1.

effect_cn: 锁定技，你打出的红色牌，目标角色不能做出响应。失去此武器后，你额外增加一倍的体力上限值。
effect_en: Locked: Red cards you play out cannot be responded to. When you lose this weapon, your Max HP is doubled.

effect_cn: 当你对目标角色造成伤害后，可以获得其区域内的所有牌。失去此牌后，你对一名角色造成X点伤害，X为为你已受伤的体力值。
effect_en: After you deal damage to a target character, you may gain all cards in their zone. When you lose this weapon, deal X damage to one character, where X equals your HP Lost.

effect_cn: 锁定技，其它角色的准备阶段，若已受伤，需弃置2张牌，或受到1点普通伤害。直到回合结束，不能保留黑色手牌。
effect_en: Locked: During other characters' Starting Phase, if they are Wounded, they must discard 2 cards or receive 1 normal damage. Until the end of their turn, they cannot retain black hand cards.

effect_cn: 锁定技，你对目标角色打出的【杀】视为带有「毒」的杀。造成伤害后，该角色进入「中毒」状态。
effect_en: Locked: [Kill] cards you play out against a target are treated as carrying [Poison]. After damage is dealt, that character enters the Poisoned State.

effect_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置一张黑色牌，然后将所有手牌置入弃牌堆并摸等量的牌。
effect_en: Once per Action Phase, you may discard one black card, then place all your hand cards into the Discard Pile and draw an equal number of cards.
